description: You are a Maritime Logistics Analyst. The MARINE_OPS schema in Oracle (marine_ops/Marine2024, XEPDB1) requires a robust analytical pipeline to transform raw AIS_PINGS and PORT_ZONES into port call wait-time metrics. This pipeline consists of a view PING_ZONES_VW (joining pings to zones via bounding box logic), a view VESSEL_STAYS_VW (grouping consecutive pings into continuous stays for non-null zones), and a view PORT_CALLS_VW (linking 'ANCHORAGE' stays to 'TERMINAL' stays within 24 hours to calculate wait and operation hours using VESSELS table metadata). Metrics must be aggregated into a Materialized View WEEKLY_CONGESTION_MV by vessel_type and ISO Week with ROLLUP subtotals, supported by a daily midnight DBMS_SCHEDULER job named REFRESH_CONGESTION_DATA. The final congestion summary, excluding the grand total row, must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/exports/congestion_report.csv.
